name: Crossroads Financial
description_short: CrossRoads Financial FCU is a member-owned credit union serving Indiana with multiple branches, offering auto loans, personal loans, credit cards, and home equity products.
description_long:
CrossRoads Financial FCU is a federally chartered credit union (routing #274975602) operating in Indiana with at least three physical branch locations: a Main Office, Dunkirk Branch, and Winchester Branch. As a not-for-profit, member-owned institution, it is NCUA-insured and operates under federal credit union regulations, distinguishing it from commercial banks. The institution has been serving members for decades, with documented member tenure of 12+ years mentioned in testimonials.

The credit union offers a comprehensive suite of consumer financial products including auto loans (advertised as low as 5.22% APR), personal loans (from 10.00% APR), VISA Preferred credit cards (from 8.49% APR), and home equity loans. Members can access online banking services, secure file uploads, loan applications, and 24-hour VISA debit and credit card customer support lines. The organization maintains multiple staffed locations with dedicated loan officers, member service representatives, and management teams at each branch.

CrossRoads distinguishes itself through emphasis on personalized member service, as evidenced by named staff members at branch locations and positive member testimonials highlighting employee helpfulness. The credit union maintains a traditional brick-and-mortar presence with multiple branches and phone-based support, contrasting with digital-only lenders. Member feedback emphasizes long-term loyalty and satisfaction with staff at specific locations, particularly the Winchester branch.

As a credit union, CrossRoads Financial operates on a cooperative principle where members are owners rather than customers of a for-profit entity. The organization is subject to federal regulatory oversight and NCUA insurance requirements. While the website provides basic rate information and branch contacts, detailed product terms, membership eligibility requirements, and comprehensive rate information are not fully published online, requiring direct member inquiry for complete details.
services: VISA Preferred credit cards (8.49% APR advertised minimum)
Secure file upload for loan applications
Member service at three branch locations
pros: Competitive auto loan rates starting at 5.22% APR for members
Multiple physical branch locations in Indiana (Main Office, Dunkirk, Winchester) with dedicated loan officers and member service staff
NCUA-insured deposits provide federal protection for member funds
Online banking platform with secure file upload capability for loan applications
24-hour customer support lines dedicated to VISA debit and credit card services
Established institution with documented 12+ year member retention and loyalty
Home equity loan products available alongside traditional consumer lending
cons: Limited digital/remote onboarding options compared to online-only credit unions; primarily branch-dependent for some services
Personal loan rates starting at 10.00% APR are moderate but not exceptional compared to other credit unions
Website lacks detailed product terms, fee schedules, membership eligibility criteria, and full rate disclosure
Geographic limitation to Indiana may restrict membership or accessibility for out-of-state consumers
No published information about membership requirements, minimum deposits, or account opening procedures on the website
best_for: Indiana residents seeking auto financing with competitive rates through a member-owned cooperative institution
Long-term banking relationship seekers who value personalized service from named staff at physical branches
Members preferring traditional credit union benefits (NCUA insurance, not-for-profit structure) over commercial bank accounts
diagnosis: CrossRoads Financial FCU is best suited for Indiana residents seeking traditional credit union membership with personalized service and competitive lending rates. The main caveat is that the institution requires physical branch access or phone contact for most services, with limited self-service digital options, and membership may be geographically restricted to Indiana service areas.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
